props.Description: When you land with a drop ship: dig a hole that the ship CAREFULLY falls into. Getting the survival kit below rock line allows stone to fall towards the survival kit for faster collection/continual gravel production.

Focus on building a base that will vertically mount a drill. Use small grid head to build up to large grid. Pistons to move further down (7 wide sweep), then when deep enough move to horizontal Hing drilling (move conveyors like rails)

Focus on building a base that will vertically mount piston drills on a rotor. drill. Use small grid head to build up to large grid. Pistons to move further down (7 wide rotation), then when deep enough move to horizontal rotor drilling (move conveyors like rails)
